channel.title: Projects on Sami's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on nenimein.fi

item.title: HPE Proliant Microserver Gen7 fan mod
item.description: Modding my HPE Proliant Microserver Gen7 (N54L) to be less loud. Also listing the fans which do not work and fans which work. Mostly …

item.title: Tesla Model X speaker measurements
item.description: Here are some measurements of a Tesla Model X, with “basic” audio package (two speakers per door). I have also included the full REW …

item.title: Migrating mumble servers
item.description: How to migrate mumble server to from old linux server to new linux server. This is mostly a reminder for myself, on how to do it in the …

item.title: Emma - Sixth part
item.description: Welcome to the sixth part of this series focused on building a SQ competition car. The class where I hope I can compete, is the EMMA Sound …

item.title: DIY: Boombox
item.description: I lost my JBL Flip bluetooth speaker, and I always wanted a bit more “boom”, so I decided to build a real boombox. Few things I want to …
